channel.title: World
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from World, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Police search of Royal Lodge continues as Andrew released under investigation – live updates
item.description: The arrest of the 66-year old former prince has sent shockwaves through the UK and abroad, with reaction rolling in from the US to Australia King: ‘Th...

item.title: Climber convicted of manslaughter after leaving girlfriend on Austria’s highest peak to seek help
item.description: Thomas P given five-month suspended prison sentence and €9,400 fine over death of Kerstin G by gross negligence Europe live – latest updates An amateu...

item.title: Asos co-founder dies in fall from 18-storey building in Thailand
item.description: Police in Pattaya confirm autopsy on body of British retail entrepreneur Quentin Griffiths found no signs of foul play Quentin Griffiths, the co-found...

item.title: Man in Sicily trained his dog to illegally dump rubbish, say police
item.description: City of Catania calls ruse to avoid CCTV cameras installed to stop fly-tipping ‘as cunning as it is doubly wrong’ A man in Catania, Sicily, trained hi...

item.title: A war foretold: how the CIA and MI6 got hold of Putin’s Ukraine plans and why nobody believed them
item.description: Drawing on more than 100 interviews with senior intelligence officials and other insiders in multiple countries, this exclusive account details how th...

item.title: Asos co-founder dies after Thailand apartment block fall
item.description: Quentin Griffiths co-founded Asos in 2000 and remained a significant shareholder after leaving the firm five years later.

item.title: 'Best ski season in years' on Scotland's snowy hills
item.description: Some of Scotland's mountain resorts say it has been the best winter snowsports season in six years.

item.title: Austrian climber found guilty after girlfriend froze to death on mountain
item.description: The woman died of hypothermia during a climbing trip on the Grossglockner mountain in January 2025.

item.title: Why was Andrew arrested and what happens next?
item.description: What we know about Andrew Mountbatten-Windsor's arrest on suspicion of misconduct in public office.

item.title: Grey's Anatomy star Eric Dane dies at 53 after ALS diagnosis
item.description: The actor, who also starred in HBO's Euphoria, battled the most common form of motor neurone disease.
